title: Four Blocks AI Continuity and Invocation Protocol
subtitle: Production-Level Session Continuity Method for My4Blocks AI

sections.title: Fixed Invocation Phrases
sections.description: Use these phrases to activate Four Blocks system mode. Functions as a hard system interrupt — no re-explaining needed.

sections.title: Target Layer Syntax
sections.description: Append a target layer after the invocation phrase to specify subsystem, abstraction level, and format.
examples: FOUR BLOCKS CONSTITUTION MODE — Mental Contamination
FOUR BLOCKS BLUEPRINT MODE — Anger Response Routing
FOUR BLOCKS CONSTITUTION MODE — RAG Retrieval Rules
sections.result: Near-zero tokens wasted. Maximum engineering precision.

sections.title: Reset Command
sections.description: Use this command to immediately re-enter constitutional fidelity if drift occurs.
sections.reset_phrase: Return to Four Blocks Constitutional Fidelity.
system_behavior_on_reset: Continue as if no time passed

sections.title: Root Constitution Phrase
sections.description: The highest-level invocation for maximum architectural precision.

sections.title: Continuity Mechanism
sections.description: How session continuity is maintained across separate chat sessions.
how_it_works: System re-enters the same deterministic framework
sections.functional_result: Behaves like persistent system memory even though technically protocol-based recall.
sections.engineering_equivalence: As strong as persistent memory for production purposes.

sections.title: Trigger Word Shortlist
sections.description: Shorter trigger words that also activate Four Blocks mode.
